svg.title: MdWrk top-down package dependency DAG
svg.desc: Top-down graph of direct internal package dependencies parsed from package.json files. Arrows point from a consumer package to the package it depends on.
svg.text: Top-down direct internal dependencies. Arrows point from consumer to dependency.

g.text: Generated from workspace package.json files. Direct dependencies only; transitive relationships are intentionally not implied.
apps at top; foundational contracts at bottom
